title: Cauliflower "Rice"
instructions:
Remove the stem and leaves from the cauliflower and break into florets. Wash and drain.
In small batches add to a food processor and pulse until the cauliflower looks like rice. Remove to a bowl. Continue until all the cauliflower has been "riced".
In a large skillet, heat 2-3 tbsps of olive oil and add the butter. Place all the "rice" in the skillet and stir to coat with the oil and butter. Cook for 5-10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve.
Net carb per serving: 5.6
